filesModified.purpose: FQA-001: Strengthen logo guard to verify attachment produces output before rendering anchor

testPage.note: PHP-only change; no test page update needed

fixesApplied.description: Replaced simple `! empty( $logoId )` guard with two-step pre-check: call theme_output_svg_or_img($logoId, false) to capture output into $logo_output, then only render the anchor + image markup when $logo_output is non-empty. This prevents an empty <a> element from rendering when logoId is stale (attachment deleted) or the file is missing.
